title: OhlcBar
description: One OHLCV bar for XAUUSD, enriched with America/New_York time. Sourced from Automation Pipeline Stage A (ingest). No engine may run on bars missing ny_time — see ICT-SIGNAL-ENGINE.md §2/§7.

ts.description: Bar open time in UTC (broker/source clock, normalized to UTC on ingest).

ny_time.description: Bar open time normalized to America/New_York (DST-aware). Mandatory per ICT/Gann engine gate; missing value must fail closed (DATA_GAP) rather than default to UTC.

broker_time.description: Optional raw broker-zone timestamp kept for audit/debug only. Never used for engine logic.
